channel.title: Extra on The Median Duck
channel.description: Recent content in Extra on The Median Duck

item.title: The (In)Accuracy of Maisie Adam
item.description: Your Task The Source of Data Data of Discrepancies A Squirt of Error The Final Tally? The Absent Task So, what’s the (Data) Situation? A Comedy of Prediction Errors The General Overview It Will All Get Better With Time? What Have We Learnt Today? Your Task Assess the accuracy, or inaccuracy (error), of Maisie Adam and her task attempt predictions in Series 20 of Taskmaster. Figure 1: Maisie’s opinion on this task and the grilling, or rather microwaving, she is going to endure.
